nodes.label: Thiran Delay
nodes.description: Per-channel delay line with Thiran allpass interpolation

nodes.label: Limit
nodes.description: Maximum delay buffer size in ms (affects memory, not CPU)

nodes.label: DelayTime
nodes.description: Actual delay time in ms (no smoothing)

nodes.label: Audio Out
nodes.description: Delayed audio signal with flat frequency response (not suitable for fast modulation)
